title: 3PCS 6FT Glittery Christmas Garlands with Hanging Rings, 180CM Artificial Magnolia Leaf Garland with Sequins for Xmas Tree, Champagne Gold Fake Leaves for Fireplace, Front Door, Stairs, Home Decor
features: These 3pcs 6ft Christmas garlands are adorned with glittery artificial magnolia leaves and hanging rings, which are ample for your decorating needs and replacements. Feel free to share them with your loved ones for a delightful collaborative decorating experience.

Our decorative Christmas garlands are meticulously handcrafted using high-quality, safe PVC and polyester materials. You can easily shape them into your preferred form and position them to your liking. Whether you choose to wrap them around your Christmas tree, drape them along your mantelpiece, or elegantly wind them around your staircase banisters, their flexible and lightweight design ensures effortless arrangement, allowing you to give life to your creative holiday displays.

Designed for indoor and sheltered outdoor use, these versatile Xmas garlands make for perfect adornments for Christmas trees, front doors, mantels, banisters, and more. These stunning, naturally-appearing decorations add an air of sophistication to any gathering, household, classroom, or office space. Their lifelike aesthetic effortlessly complements various decor styles, bestowing timeless charm upon your surroundings.

Our Christmas leaf garlands exude an air of elegance, with their realistic portrayal of magnolia leaves infusing beauty into the spaces they adorn, thereby setting the ideal stage for a memorable Christmas celebration. If you have a penchant for crafts, you can also pair these Christmas garlands with other special Christmas embellishments, such as pine cones, red berries, Christmas baubles, poinsettias, decorative pendants, and more.

Service Guaranteed: During transit and arrangement, some powder may fall off from the garlands – there's no need to worry. If you have any questions about quality protection and refunds of our decorative magnolia leaf garlands please feel free to contact us through the Amazon message center. We strive to make your shopping experience as pleasant as possible.
